productDisplayName: Puma Men's El Ace 2 Black Grey Purple Shoe
description: Here is vintage restyling at its finest. Constructed with a smooth, sleek leather upper, the El Ace from puma features a perforated leather toe panel for air flow, a cushioned, breathable footbed, and a hook-and-loop rubber strap for an enhanced Fit every time. Team it with stylish sleek bottoms and a checked shirt for the perfect casual look.Upper Leather upper material with soft suede overlays for a sportier feel Perforated toe box for ventilation Lightly padded tongue and collar Rubber strap, with puma logo detail, attached with an elastic strip to the midsole with PUMA logo detail Embroidered Puma cat on the suede patch above the heel cup Lace closure for a snug fit Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Full length phylon midsole for maximum light weight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole in diamond shaped grooves for maximum traction
